The '''Homanans''' were a mysterious race of shape-changing [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] from the [[Homana system/Legends|Homana system]]. They could change their size from anything the size of a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] to that of an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] and were also slightly [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]], as well as altering the pigment of cells within their flesh. Mimicking clothes, or anything skin tight, was an easy feat. [[Nana]] was a member of the species.
